title: fumaria capreolata
intro: Fumaria capreolata, also known as ramping fumitory or creeping fumitory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fumariaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating conditions like diarrhea and rheumatism. Fumaria capreolata can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
